Our courts sit under railway arches with over 12 metres of height above you, giving the game the space, scale and atmosphere it deserves. Big lobs, proper rallies, no ceiling getting in the way.

Our changing rooms and raised viewing gallery are currently nearing completion and we hope to have them open in the next few weeks.

For the love of the game, we are bringing padel to the people, to you.
We believe that everyone should experience the game & world of padel. Within our clubs, we allow people to come together, be sportive, social and inclusive. We create a pay & play club that asks no commitment of you, nor imposes any restrictions. We strive to be the benchmark for padel.

Please be aware that we do not take responsibility for any accidents or injuries sustained in the club while playing, parked or otherwise.
West London Pickleball Club in beautiful private surroundings with bar / food & car parking.

6 outdoor, floodlit padel tennis courts in Wetherby offering players premium courts at affordable prices.  Enjoy being part of a vibrant club offering leagues, matches, membership, coaching, mix-ins and social events.

We operate two high-specification, panoramic doubles courts with fully-automated access and regulation LED lighting, all covered by a 9m high canopy for year-round play (and high lobs!). 
Whether you’re stepping onto the court for the first time or ready for your next big match, our facilities are designed to make padel friendly, accessible and fun.
A racket vending machine is available with adult and junior rackets are in stock. 
A ball and accessory vending machine which sells tubes of balls, overgrips, sweatbands snacks and drinks. Payment for the vending machines is by contactless only (no cash).
We are an LTA registered venue.
Coaching is available with Natalie Gill. Nat has represented Team GB and captain’s Yorkshire Ladies and has been a padel coach for 6 years, qualified with Padel MBA coach levels 1 and 2. Natalie coaches all ages ensuring that it’s fun, engaging players go away with many teaching points.

Discover padel at West Derby Golf Club, featuring three premium pro-panoramic outdoor courts beautifully set within the scenic golf course grounds. Players can enjoy top-tier facilities alongside a vibrant club atmosphere, making it the perfect destination for both competitive matches and social play.
Balls, rackets, grips & snacks are available at the pro shop, located over the bridge on the way to the club house.

Padel arrives in Widnes at Widnes Tennis Club located next to St Peter and Pauls School on Highfield Road.
2 floodlit uncovered Padel Courts are now available from 08.00 till 22.00 each day. Bats including Junior size are available at no extra charge for use but please return to the box after use. Please be advised we do not provide free balls but we do sell them.
Tennis Club Membership is also available which then qualifies you for members discount and a longer booking window.

Founded in 1865 and set on the edge of Epping Forest, the Woodford Wells Club is a hidden gem. It offers the opportunity to play multiple sports and provides modern facilities and a welcoming and relaxed atmosphere.
The Club has a strong sense of community, a friendly factor that contributes to its success and that vital family aspect which encourages all ages to play sport. It is an attractive Club largely run by members for members with highly competitive membership rates.
“The Wells” welcomes everyone who wants to play sport, watch sport or simply just talk about sport.
Join our Club, discover Woodford Wells and enjoy yourself. It’s more than just a sports club.
